Privacy Policy

Last Updated: May 2026

A.R. Constructions ("we," "us," or "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website for Vrundavan Luxury Residences.

1. Information Collection

We collect information that you voluntarily provide when you fill out contact forms, download brochures, or register for updates. This may include:

  • Name and Contact Details (Phone number, Email address).
  • Preferences regarding property types (1 BHK, 2 BHK, etc.).
  • Any messages or inquiries you send through our contact forms.

2. Use of Information

The information we collect is used solely for the following purposes:

  • To provide you with information regarding Vrundavan Luxury Residences.
  • To respond to your inquiries and provide customer support.
  • To send you updates about construction progress or new offerings (only if you have opted in).
  • To improve our website experience and marketing efforts.

3. Data Protection

We implement a variety of security measures to maintain the safety of your personal information. Your data is stored securely and is only accessible by authorized personnel who are required to keep the information confidential.

4. Third-Party Disclosure

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personally identifiable information to outside parties. This does not include trusted third parties who assist us in operating our website or conducting our business, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential.

5. Cookies

Our website may use "cookies" to enhance user experience. You may choose to set your web browser to refuse cookies, or to alert you when cookies are being sent.

6. Contact Us

If you have any questions regarding this Privacy Policy, you may contact us at +91 99207 39555 or visit our office at Plot No. 1, Sector-6, Pethali, Taloja One, Navi Mumbai 410208.

Vrundavan Luxury Residences — 1 BHK & Premium 2 BHK homes in Pethali, Taloja One, Navi Mumbai 410208. A community built on quality, care, and the finest lifestyle.
